data.title: What's Going On With Nokia Stock On Friday?
data.description: Nokia Corp (NYSE: NOK) stock rebounds after disappointing quarterly report, with net sales down 8% to $4.76B. CEO focuses on data center and defense sectors for growth, and plans to cut jobs to save costs.

data.title: Activision Fixes Call Of Duty's Ricochet Glitch That Wrongly Targeted Players
data.description: Activision disables a Ricochet exploit in Modern Warfare 3 and Warzone, restoring wrongly flagged player accounts.

data.title: Blackstone Exceeds Expectations After Identifying 'The Macro Bottom': Analysts Applaud 'Best Investment Returns In 3 Years'
data.description: Blackstone (BX) reported strong Q3 revenues. Analysts expect improving backdrop for transactions and raise price targets.

data.title: Call Of Duty's 2025 Game Rumored To Be A Black Ops 2 Sequel
data.description: Leaks indicate the 2025 Call of Duty will be a Black Ops 2 sequel set in the 2030s, with fans awaiting confirmation from Activision.

data.title: Cryptocurrency NEAR Protocol Rises More Than 4% In 24 hours
data.description: Over the past 24 hours, NEAR Protocol's (CRYPTO: NEAR) price has risen 4.62% to $4.9. This continues its positive trend over the past week where it has experienced a 3.0% gain, moving from $4.75 to its current price. As it stands right now, the coin's all-time high is $20.44.
